source: Local Playwright captures through title screen > Play Now > Play Game into pregame stadiumCenterOrbit.
notes: Clear validates the sunny pregame sky keeps the visible sun disc and glow.
Overcast validates the grey sky renders without visible sun disc or glow.
Rain validates the darker sky renders without visible sun disc or glow and with precipitation streak geometry.
Pregame weather selection resolves to the same condition used by Grant Mercer weather commentary assets.
